overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a character in a long coat walking along a dirt path toward Hogwarts castle at night. The journey progresses from a wooded trail lined with lanterns through open grassland to the castle's gothic courtyard, featuring dramatic stormy skies and warm artificial lighting from windows.

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along a dirt path bordered by trees and stone lanterns, holding a wand in right hand

entered.detail: tall dark trees forming a dense forest border along the left side of the path
medieval-style stone lamp posts emitting warm yellow light along the path edge
narrow winding dirt trail through grass and forest
large gothic castle with multiple towers and spires visible in the distance, windows glowing with warm light
open grassy meadow extending to the right of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a forested dirt path at night, passing medieval stone lanterns that cast warm pools of light. Tall trees line the left side while open grassland stretches to the right, with the distant silhouette of Hogwarts castle visible ahead against a stormy sky.

events.description: character exits the tree line into open grassland, forest ending abruptly on the left
character turns right to follow the curving path toward the castle

agents.ego_description: character continues walking along the path as it curves right through open fields, castle growing larger in view

entered.detail: stone fortification walls of the castle becoming visible in the middle distance

segments.scene_description: Leaving the forest behind, the character emerges into wide open grassland as the path curves right. The castle walls become clearly visible ahead, growing from a distant silhouette to a detailed structure with illuminated windows, while the sky remains dark and overcast.

events.description: ground becomes wet and reflective, showing puddles on the path surface

agents.ego_description: character walking toward and entering the castle courtyard, approaching the main gatehouse and towers

entered.detail: main entrance structure with arched gateway and heavy wooden doors
tall stone spires and turrets with pointed roofs dominating the skyline
multiple windows emitting warm orange light from within the castle walls
gothic arched doorways and windows in the castle facade

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the imposing castle entrance, with gothic towers and fortified walls now filling the frame. The path leads directly to the gatehouse, passing wet reflective ground and illuminated stone archways. Warm light spills from numerous windows, contrasting with the cool blue storm clouds overhead as the character enters the castle courtyard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded forested trail that gradually opens into the imposing gothic courtyard of Hogwarts castle. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path at night, passing medieval stone lanterns that cast warm pools of light against a backdrop of tall trees and a distant, stormy silhouette. As the forest recedes, the path curves right and emerges into wide open grassland, allowing the castle walls to grow from a far-off shape into a detailed structure with glowing windows. The scene then shifts toward the imposing entrance, where the camera glides over wet reflective ground and under illuminated stone archways. Finally, the view expands to fill the frame with towering gothic spires and fortified walls as the character enters the courtyard under a canopy of cool blue storm clouds.
